title: Cloud Solution Engineer  (AWS / Azure | DevOps | Kubernetes)
description:
Cloud Solution Engineer (AWS / Azure | DevOps | Kubernetes)

Working hour: Monday to Friday 9am to 6pm

Location: Pasir Panjang

Salary package: Excellent benefits + 18 Days of Leave + Excellent Benefits

Responsibilities:

  • Develop proof-of-concepts for the cloud platform alongside the product team and stakeholders.
  • Support internal user hosting and infrastructure solution through modern cloud architecture and the adoption of agile development practices.
  • Responsible in both small and large-scale cloud-based projects to support customer for product team in enhancing the cloud platform's value.
  • Collaborate directly with the cloud engineering team, product team, and key stakeholders.
  • Provide system troubleshooting and problem-solving across platform and application domains, including participating in on-call escalations for internal customer-facing issues.
  • Take ownership of end-to-end solutions provided by various teams across the organization.
  • Assist in migration activities for cloud platforms.

Requirements

  • Degree in Computer Science or equivalent with 5 years of relevant experience in the below areas:
  • Passion for automation, standardization, and best practices.
  • Experience managing cloud infrastructure and services on AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform.
  • Solid hands-on experience in designing, building, deploying, and securing highly available web applications on cloud platforms such as AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform.
  • Experience with DevOps tools like Azure DevOps or GitLab.
  • Experience with back-end technologies such as Java, .NET, Node.js, Python, or Go.
  • Good understanding of network components such as load balancers, firewalls, VPNs, and DNS.
  • Good understanding of DevOps principles and practices, with knowledge of DevSecOps being an added advantage.

If you are excited by the above opportunity and challenges and enjoy making things happen, do apply now!

OR

Email your resume to: spwl@scientecpersonnel.com

Wyman Low

Assistant Manager (IHRP - CP)

Low Yong Wei (Wyman) - R1550983

ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd - 11C5781

postedCompany.description:
An award-winning company founded in 2004, ScienTec has transformed organizations across Asia Pacific with our 4 principal services: Staffing, Specialist Search, Outsourcing and HR Consulting.

Our "People First, Always" core value underpins our mission to redefine the standards of HR services and deliver you top-tier candidate support, as reflected in our attainment of key accolades such as Recruitment Agency of the Year, Best Client Service, and Best Candidate Experience.


Our sector and functional coverage include ICT/technology, industrial engineering, and corporate services recruitment.


By submitting your resume, you give your express consent that ScienTec Consulting may use your personal information to process your job application and to contact you from time to time for future employment opportunities.

For further information on how ScienTec Consulting processes your personal information and how to access and correct your information, please read the ScienTec Consulting’s Privacy Policy (https://www.scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

Please do not submit any sensitive personal data to us in your resume (such as government ID numbers, ethnicity, gender, religion, marital status) as we do not collect your personal data at this time.


All job applications will be processed with strict confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
